movie.actors: Kevin Bernhardt, Lawrence Mortorff, Terry Farrell, Ken Carpenter
movie.plot: An investigative reporter must send the newly unbound Pinhead and his legions back to Hell.
movie.title: Hellraiser III: Hell on Earth
movie.writer: Clive Barker (characters), Peter Atkins (story), Tony Randel (story), Peter Atkins (screenplay)
